channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Anyone else getting the itch? — 89 replies — 356.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Anyone else getting the itch?

Open thread • Replies: 89 • Updated: 2026-03-04 13:05 UTC

OP

The big boys'll go back up, that's guaranteed money. But some others will 10x, 100x, 1000x. I'm feelin' like it's SHIB's turn.

Early replies (first 3)

61900851
>>61899833
Checked

61900872
>>61899833
I'll just keep buying small amounts of it for the rest of my life, and see what happens.

61900948
>>61899833
i believe in shib

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61921144
>>61899833
none of these shitcoins are gonna do big movements again retard

61921169
>>61921144
No such thing as a free lunch

61921558
Just bought some more boys, let's go

61921644
>>61901257
This already rugged.

61921961
>>61921558
Ummm based?

61921988
>>61921644
Checked and true

61922004
kek turd killer still being shilled here in 2026
lmfao nice AI pics btw

61922014
>>61922004

61922070
>>61922004
You have 2 more weeks wagie

61922078
I hope you don’t buy toad

61922734
No one is buying toad in a shib thread! Shib is going to 14x to ath and toad will go to zero. Shib already has an etf coming and toad has desperate curry flavored shills. LMAO!

61923250
>>61922734
When toad moons YOU'RE going to seethe, when toad moons YOU'RE going to rope!

61923260
>>61899833
I am in anon, people are too stupid to skip this one.
And some Doge in case the elom makes a comeback.

61924787
>>61922734
See
>>61922014

61926036
>>61899833
This thread smells like curry and shit.

Also, shibaggies holding their shibags to zero.

61926122
>>61926036
>This thread smells like curry and shit.
So like most threads on /biz ?

>>61926036
>Also, shibaggies holding their shibags to zero.
Sure buddy. The number 1 meme on eth is going to zero goy!

61927655
>>61926122
>The number 1 meme on eth is going to zero goy!
i'm genuinely considering dumping the rest of what i hold because of this post

61927803
>>61927655
Checked dump it

61927812
>>61899833
you will be lucky to get a 3x

61927816
>>61927812
Shib is ez 10x bear case 33x bull case

61927892
>>61927816
Never happening

61928058
>>61927892
>Shib will never go to a place it’s been before because it just won’t.
You sound tarded bro

61928094
>>61928058
It only went there because of insane hype and FOMO. It will never happen again unless Elon makes it the official currency of X or something

61928421
>>61927655
Please do fud chud. I like cheapies.
>>61927812
>>61928094
He didn't buy cheap before the etf and clarity act passed.
>NGMI!

61929970
> shib niggers in this thread ignoring the most obvious 1000-3000x token right in front of them

61931432
>>61929970
Its no use anon. These people like being poor. Sit back and hodl and wait for the fireworks.

61931717
Shib is positive returns for evm daily trade bots. Over 60% positive returns. So far they’re all trading at above 50% positive returns for bot trading. What ever happened to shiba sex? Still a general.

61931779
This thread makes me so happy, I thought all my Shibros had abandoned /biz/ forever...we're back in full force!

61932425
While retards in the chat slurping a shitcoin that’s already over 5 years olde, the smart money is dropping at least .2 eff on toad, just sitting back watching the drama unfold

61934414
50x

item.title: Reminder even 100 million NW is not generational wealth worthy — 53 replies — 212.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Reminder even 100 million NW is not generational wealth worthy

Open thread • Replies: 53 • Updated: 2026-03-04 13:11 UTC

OP

Reminder even 100 million NW is not generational wealth worthy

Early replies (first 3)

61931291
This is just a coon who doesn't understand investments and compounding returns.

61931302
>>61931288
Probably bought a bunch of houses and cars that he couldn't afford the maintenance and taxes on

61931311
>>61931302
>>61931291
>>61931288
He's right though

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61932019
>>61931967
It's often line up with specific target goals the player has to make which is a hefty goal.
There goes another 20 million.
Then you have mandatory coach, manager and stadium fees.

61932020
>>61931992
it fucking doesn't lol

61932022
Saddest part is the teams and league hire a bunch of financial planning jews to prevent this. And the service is free. It's bad optics for their players to go bankrupt.
But naww man I aint need dat shit.

61932031
People who get CTE for a living probably don't make good investments

61932036
>>61932020
Agent takes $3m
Taxes takes $43.65m at 45%
That leaves him with $53.35m over 5 years

61932053
>>61932020
True, it's less.
Nigger must be forgetting the oxygen taxes.

61932058
That nigger can't even theorize what the difference between 30 million and 60 million would be, and neither can the average mutt. Just fucking park 40 million into CDs or bonds and you still make 1.6 million? Fuck even holding that much in silver since 2019 and he would've had a 5x on his stack.

Why do liberals love to hawk at successful entrepreneurs like bezos and musk for not eradicating poverty when niggers like this and billie eyelash gets a pass?

61932073
>>61931288
... if you are a nigger

61932140
>>61931288
How to become and stay rich

Step 1: don't be a retarded nigger

61932153
>>61931288
>His bank gifted him a car
What?

61932198
>>61931288
>famous TV negro goes broke
I'm going to guess he was doing 84mo loans on his Bugattis from native americans for 1000% APR, or some dumb nigger shit like that

61932440
>>61931311
>>61931288
he should have let his white masta manage his money for him, then he wouldnt be deal with these issue.

61932444
>>61931311
how else am i as a famous person going to hush all the women i raped and the minors i molested, as well as pay my lawer when this shit inevitably hits the fan?

61932449
>>61932020
It's less actually hes in the top bracket so 37% federal, 10% for new york, 3.7% for nyc that's over half his income stolen by the government before his agent gets his gibs

61932469
He made 1 million dollars a month. All he had to do was put half in an index fund. Use the other half to lease cars, rent a mansion and chimp out

61932474
>>61932469
btw he probably did commercials, and had sponsorships wtf lmao.

61932492
>>61932474
The nigger ball player is the peak example why you cant just give people money and expect it to wildly improve their lives. Sure maybe 10% or even 15% of homelessness is caused by external factors out of their control. But the vast majority of people in general only operate on a surface level thinking.

61932506
When you’re publicly rich, every single thing l.e. forces you to pay for. Every single word out of your mouth costs a dollar amount. Every single social interaction the other person has to get paid for.

61932528
>>61931311
if you all are going be jewish like this, why not just say 12m instead of 120m
>retards

61932553
>>61931312
> 1 in 10 Americans are millionaires
That's over 35 million millionaires
There's enough millionaires in America to fill up a megacity
Historically speaking that's outrageous

61932636
>>61931311
>>61931288
>>61931960
They account for this in the drafting/management of players. Ones who spend/save/invest wisely are a threat to the business model, because they throw water on the spectacle and are also way more likely to hold the leagues/players associations to account. If players come out of their careers independently wealthy, they can't be controlled by the unions. The NBA had a dude like this and he caused all kinds of headaches for owners.
If you refuse to play the "flaunt" game and act like you've got some sense with your money, you start to see opportunities disappear. You can only have but so many players who are set and can go, "Yeah, I'ma go free agent and head where I'm treated best," before the business model has to change.
It's all about control. They love guys like this one because they show that the protocol works for their purposes. People will continue to end up where they're placed until they wake up and stop taking what they're given without thinking deeply about the situation and acting accordingly.
Honestly, this also applies to many professions where there's pressure to be profligate. This is the reason why. You're supposed to live beyond your means because it's part of the plan to keep you at least predictable, if not out-right controlled. So I don't really fault people for falling for it.

61932694
>>61931288
Athletes in general get raped (financially) all the time. Too many bottom feeders holding out their hands going 'gimme' then chimping out when told no. The only one that's managed to get away with that is Manny Pacquaio and that's because he lives in third world Phillipines where a dollar is like a million pesos to them.

Evander Holyfield had to fight deep into his 40s despite making 250+ million dollars because he was retarded and bought an uber mansion with tons of cars and had tons of babies with different mamas and they all wanted 5 figure child support because women don't care about men, even their fathers.

Adrien Broner is deep in debt and yet his last paycheck he went out and partied. Athlete's are retarded with money bottom line and too many people from managers to agents to finance guys to so called friends and families see them as nothing more then a bank account their entitled to.

61932710
>>61931967
It's worse in boxing. Say you make a 100 grand for a fight. Your promoter gets a percent right off the top. So does your manager, and maybe your coach too. Percentages vary but I've seen promoter and manager percentages go as high as 30%. Then you pay your cutman and second, then you pay your training camp (if its away from home) and sparring partners. Then you pay whatever nutritionist and S&C coach, your publicist, flight, fees, etc. and taxes. At the end you're looking at far less then what you earned on paper. Bernard Hopkins said his first million payday only 50% actually made it into his bank account.

61932753
>>61931288

61932881
>>61932528
>why not let the goyim know their 17 dollar an hour job is actually 9 dollars an hour after taxes and reductions

61933005
>>61931288
Why are you faggots obsessed with "generational" wealth? Even if you raise your children perfectly, it is only a matter of a few generations down the line before they become decadent and lose your fortune. At most just provide them a beater car, a starter house, and pay for their education.

61933411
>>61931288
they could give him 100 billion and he'd still go bankrupt
funny how you only see this with blacks, everyone else seems to have little issue managing money

61934349
>>61933005
>just let all the other groups that hate you have wealth and status bro

61934356
>>61931967
you can't read?

61934424
>>61933005
Black people love catchy sayings like "generational wealth", especially TV blacks. They get any kind of money and recognition and then they want to larp as Malcom X for some reason, even if they still do nigga shit like having baby mommas and getting arrested.

item.title: This wagie has escaped — 14 replies — 56.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
This wagie has escaped

Open thread • Replies: 14 • Updated: 2026-03-04 13:18 UTC

OP

I did it anons. I escaped the wagie cage, work offered me a redundancy thinking i would say no and ask to be redployed in another shitty role.
The HR roastie was visibly shaken. "But anon, the market is tough right now!" After 15 years i have paid off all debt and saved plus will be 200k after tax redundancy.

After selling my house, this will give me enough to retire in SEA. Fuck waging.

Early replies (first 3)

61933494
>>61933477
kek

61933581
>>61933477
The Light abandons no man

61933627
>>61933477
>retire in SEA
ehhhhhhhhhh

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61933725
>>61933627
I know i know anon. But it's the only viable option. Everything else is over priced or over run.
Where else can you live a good life on $1500/month when you're notw some retard with free housing from gibz

61933844
>>61933725
1500 per month on 200k is very reckless, unless you have a solid investment strategy like investing in third world bonds that yield over 10 percent annually

61933862
>>61933844
No i will sell my house and have just over 1 mil so will be fine.
This wagie is never going back in the cage

61933866
>>61933862
make sure to visit before committing to long term plans

61933873
>>61933866
It can't be worse than here

61933885
>>61933477
>The HR roastie was visibly shaken.
>called their bluff
absolutely based, anon. good work

61933899
>>61933873
It can.

61933939
>>61933899
Anon I'm starting to suspect you're either a white woman, a redditor or an asian man ass blasted about white boys mogging them at home.

61934421
>>61933899
it really can't. retiring in a LCOL area in america means you're surrounded by niggers with shit weather or you're surrounded by mayo monkey meth addicts with shit weather. living in a tropical third world country and occasionally getting some jungle gook pussy is infinitely superior.

61934436
>>61933939
fuck it, good luck to you buddy, stick to the plan, make it happen by eoy.

item.title: PYPL merger edition 1 — 95 replies — 64.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
PYPL merger edition 1

Open thread • Replies: 95 • Updated: 2026-03-04 11:50 UTC

OP

Here we go!

Early replies (first 3)

61891698
Do it Ryan.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61909665
no merger.
we are fucked

61909693
>>61909665
the gap will be filled

61909824
>>61904697

61910089
>>61906351
Thanks for playing, baggies.

61910124
>>61909824

61915327
Any news?

61916113
>>61915327
https://www.marketbeat.com/instant-alerts/filing-intech-investment-management-llc-purchases-30734-shares-of-paypal-holdings-inc-pypl-2026-02-28/

61918275
Is this still going to 60$? I went all in at 46 because of this thread.

61919240
>>61918275
I Hope return at price of institutional have buy

61919338
>>61892826
>$300
impressive

61919350
>>61918275
>d
the CEO will get his big cut only at $83 dollar share price MINIMUM.
look at warner bros that shit went from below $10 to now beeing baught at $30
If Paypal gets aquired it will be atleast $100

61919773
>>
https://hedgefollow.com/stocks/PYPL
Hope

61921315
>>61919350
I doubt it will go that high.

61923340
>>61923318

61923342
>>61923340

61925981
>>61904727
At the rate they were going, it wasn't going to be a big acquisition, merely a ripple on the pond

61926795
AMZN

61927102
Can someone explain why Paula even exists?? I remember you needed it for eBay back when everything was new. Somehow it morphed into the default asking to payment

61928616
>>61927102
It exists because easy cc payment processor services didn't exist for a long time. You used to give your cc info directly to the web vendors at payment, which eventually got people scammed on shady websites. Paypal was the first of its kind there. The internet has somehow COMPLETELY forgotten that money used to be a complete pain in the ass to move around. Btc, being somewhat clunky now, was actually a huge move in being able to transfer money without oversight or other friction overhead. Now that its been incorporated into the collectivist panopticon, both btc and PayPal are harder to use than just years ago

61930361
ooooooooooooooooooooooooooo

61931059
46,75$
+2,75%

61933950
I legit feel bad for PYPL bag holders. Shit was over $300 a share 5 years ago. But you guys should just dump it and put it into something else.

61933966
No.
Former PYPL invested in PLTR.
70>6>210
Now paypal 300>40>900 by ending 2028

61934006
>>61933966
>900 by ending 2028
/biz/ is worse than stocktwits bots

61934225
>>61934006
ok

61934245
>>61934225
>it happened to Palantir so it will happen to Paypal
>ignoring the fact that Palantir is benefiting from the AI boom
>also ignoring the fact that Thiel is a Trump/Vance guy and Palantir is getting lots of government contracts
Fucking retard

item.title: 100 US OIL — 21 replies — 28.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
100 US OIL

Open thread • Replies: 21 • Updated: 2026-03-04 12:34 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

61933655
>>61933646
ICEssies lost
EVChuds won!

61933658
>>61933646
I just fired up my bicycle!

61933661
Let the kaffir deal in the real world

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61933668
>>61933661
Bidens gas prices!

61933670
>>61933646
Got a ban on driving for half a year recently.
It suddenly feels good to not be involved with gas prices kek.

61933678
Fucking hell

61933712
>>61933646
no

61933723
>>61933646
1 Liter fuel is 2 Euro again, Diesel slightly lower. Amerimutts complain about not even half of that with higher wages.

61933760
>>61933646
I voted for this

61933787
>>61933712
>CFD Petrolio WTI
europoor spotted

61933802
>>61933723
Here it's 1.26. Saturday it was 1.16 for Diesel. Cunts just waited for a reason to bump prices

61933843
>>61933787
spot americh

61933854
>>61933723
amerimutts love to bitch and moan about everything
they pay less for fuel, cars and houses while earning more than me
I hate them so god damn much it's unreal

61933923
>>61933802
Wow wtf where? Bulgaria?

61933934
>>61933923
Yeah. It was fairly quiet at the pumps yesterday, but i live in small town, so things in big cities might be different. Romania i think has the lowest fuel prices in the area (outside of Turkey, but Turkey is turbofucked by inflation). I was surprised how expensive fuel is in Serbia and Hungary though.

61933947
>>61933934
I hope americans also suffer at least, this is painful

61933970
>>61933712

item.title: Chainlink is honestly the most hilarious scam ever concocted. — 33 replies — 22.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
Chainlink is honestly the most hilarious scam ever concocted.

Open thread • Replies: 33 • Updated: 2026-03-04 11:49 UTC

OP

Chainlink is honestly the most hilarious scam ever concocted. At least with scams like ICP, the baggies quickly knew they were scammed, the token went to zero and they could move on with their life and try to recover.

Instead Chainlink keeps the scam going for years and years, with new "partnerships" and "news" and "integrations", all while the token does nothing. They give just enough breadcrumbs to keep the baggies holding on desperately for a pump, and they probably keep buying even more LINK tokens as well ensuring they remain poor forever as they wait for a "mega moon" that never comes.

In that way it's actually a more brutal and evil scam, but still funny. It's crazy because all they had to do was buy Bitcoin... or gold, or the S&P 500, or literally anything else.

Early replies (first 3)

61931782
fuck all stinkies :}
hate em all hate em all
think they SUUUUCK xD

61931907
>>61931684
>At least with scams like ICP, the baggies quickly knew they were scammed, the token went to zero and they could move on with their life and try to recover.
Wait a minute. You're telling me I've DCA'd into a scam all these years?

61931931
thanks for keeping this a Chainlink board

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61931939
>>61931782
With comments like these biz should really be renamed to /trash.
Is this supposed to be funny?

61931956
>>61931684
Just glad we can all have a good laugh about it.

61931958
>>61931939
hi there triggered stinkie :}
we see you

61931976
>>61931907
well, you've learned how to dca, next step is to actually buy something worthwhile, like dogshit or bankrupted towel stock

61931997
>>61931976
don't forget GME :} the list of shit that is superior to even link is endless

61932038
>>61931958
Just keep doing what your doing. Sit in your chair in the corner and keep informing me of my financial performance on an hourly basis so that I dont need to open up the app. Thanks.

61932060
This site is shit now. I'm on here less and less. What a rubbish thread. Twitter completely ate /biz's lunch.

61932062
>>61931684
what's the deal with the LINK obsession? there are hundreds of bad cryptos to invest in, like every single one of them. why the singling out? reads like a psyop.

61932076
>>61932038
ok

61932086
>>61932062
Because linkies were smug. They fudded their own token endlessly to keep normies away from making it. We had to spend years listening to their grandiose scenarios, their $81k prediction and their lack of self awareness. Now linkies will spend years listening how bad they failed. Their hubris was their fall. Adem won.

61932119
>>61932062
>reads like a psyop.
/biz is a psyop board ran by banking cartel flunkies, anything that gets fudded here I assume is a threat to the bank niggers and I dive in out of spite

61932122
>>61932086
this
we fuddies are the warriors of justice
we will see to it that the linkie hubris is punished for all eternity
might i remind you all that one of link's first memes was "are nolinkers even human?"

61932285
>>61932086
ill agree with this in about 10 more years if link never hits 100

for the next 10 years ill buy link tho. should pump to 11 some day ,

61932295
yikes

61932298
chainlink will be sub $5 this year. let that sink in.

61932327
>>61932298
If it does I will put usd 5 million in, just to spite you, you insufferable fuck. Ffs. Give it a rest.

61932513
>>61932327
>i-i-i'm a bajillionaire....
cope, stinky

61932516
>>61932513
Haha, you don't understand. It doesn't matter what i do or do not have. Anons do.

61932522
If we could be guaranteed that link would moon to $500 tomorrow but 10% of us would be injected with AIDS. Would you guys vote for that happening?

61932558
Fuddies know the second Link crosses $1,000 they will immediately be hunted and tortured across the globe. It’s quite literally in their best interest to keep this shit low.

61932671
It has been a brutal hold and I'm better off focusing on a high income career than waiting for this shit. I could have semi retired in 2021 but didn't sell.

61932731
Crazy how these threads are always 95 percent the same brown fuddie cockroach hopping ids and replying to himself to give the illusion of consensus.
Like there's no point whatsoever. Everyone's on x where you're salty and blocked and nothing posted here changes or does anything lmao. A million hours wasted on nothing

Herbs

61932783
>>61932731
Crazy how you keep seasoning dozens and even hundreds of threads after all these years and yet you keep coming back to them like a pig at the trough.
One might even be liberal enough to say that you keep coming back to them as if you were a paypig at the trough.

61932904
>>61932558
Link will be $999 in 2126 and fudies WILL ROPE

>just hold for a century bruv

61932907
>>61932731
Ok but price? Chart?

61933029
its funny seeing the same fudders unleashing their pent up vitriol day in day out fudding their own shitcoin after all these years, brain damaged cucks lmao. You retards were smug yourselves, wasted 2 bull markets in a row being all uppity and keeping le normies out xddd, should have bought some other shitcoins and not sat on your asses hahaha maybe then you wouldnt waste your life f5'ing this dead board to cry about link (the same token that makes up 90+% of your portfolio because you're a dumb poorfaggot who has 0 clue how to make money)

61933088

61933115

Open thread • Replies: 73 • Updated: 2026-03-04 09:43 UTC

OP

61926222
yarrr

61926235

arr har har harr! get ye telescope and check this shipmate!

61926254
Arrgh matey, IQCHADJEETs Silva stock bussin nigga frfr on kirk nigga

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61928884
>>61928841
>Only paper silver pumps and dumps like a shit coin.

Talking about shitcoins good Ol' Black Rock one of the biggest real estate assets collectors is starting to liquidate its Bitcoin assets. Doesn't seem like it's a good year to be a crypto bro.

61928922
>>61928867
Blood moon, im gonna COOM!

61928930
>>61928870
The premiums are normally lower. When things are unstable they get very high.

>>61928848
I am talking about $10+ pumps and dumps happening in a single day. That is not natural. If this dropped $15 dollars in a month it would be believable. But you can't even do that because of real supply and demand for silver. And everyone can see when the big dumps happen and figure out who is doing it based on time zone. Cartels killing Mexican miners and silver bombs being dropped on Iran is now added onto your cheap silver tamping problems.

61928997
>>61928930
You're forgetting about Jane Street recently becoming one of the biggest Silver Futures holder right now. You know, the same one being investigated by India and China.

https://coinpedia.org/news/why-is-silver-falling-jane-streets-1-3b-slv-bet-sparks-manipulation-debate/
https://www.reuters.com/world/india/jane-street-deposits-567-million-escrow-accounts-per-india-regulatory-directives-2025-07-14/
https://archive.is/wip/dCGDy

Fuckers are even beating Black Rock. Trying to apply technical analysis to this market while fun is ultimately an exercise in futility if you don't know all of its key players suppressing the price. The only good position in Silver is owning it physically.

61929008
>>61928997
>The only good position in Silver is owning it physically.


The choice of broke retards,,,,no thanks shill

61929016
>>61928930
>Cartels killing Mexican miners and silver

The price dropped $20 yall said this would make it go up $30,,,,lmao yall learned nothing and still claim to nostradamus

61929416
>>61929008
Most of us bought years ago. Myself included. (And yes I did sell a few ounces when it was over $80 a while ago.) The rest are people willing to buy at a loss or are retards. I am here to watch for fun. You are not stressing me out. I wait for Comex to be found empty with glee.

61929468
>>61929416
>And yes I did sell a few ounces when it was over $80 a while ago.
absolutely no shame in that. It's quite literally what silver is for. You buy it when the price is low, build up your stack, and once the GSR closes down like it did recently you sell off no more than half of your stack and convert the FIAT you receive into free gold.
Holding silver forever hoping it will make you rich one day is the same as buying bitcoin nowadays and hoping for the same.
Rinse and repeat.

61929486
About to try and get a refund from TD, been 36 business days and no confirmation of my 4 bars being shipped. They’re gonna try and say some final sale bullshit, but they’ve not held up their part of the “contract”. I stupidly grabbed 5 one ounce silver maples 2 weeks ago, might try to lump that in with the refund (x to doubt for this part being refund) cause I could just run and slurp those 5 locally for same price I paid on TD. Inb4 I get the refund and silver moons before I get the cash back in my account to go buy at my LCS

61929507
I considered selling a little silver for gold recently but quite like that Clive Thompson characters approach if at least waiting for 30to one instead of 50plus. It's nice to have a little pike of silver anyway even if I prefer gold. So atm I'll jyst dca more

61929573
>>61929468
Didn't sell my gold. Not buying gold right now. Maybe in a few years I will buy some bling. Waiting for stock market cheapies and pampering myself this month. Thanks occult retards. You are so predictable. It is fun to find out how many of you blackmailed ziontards own shares stocks I still hold.

61929582
>>61929573
please rewrite that in English and without the schizobabble

61929747
>>61929582
People who got rich have multi generational wealth spend money to cause things to fulfil prophesies because they are bored. It works until people catch on and can figure out when they buy and sell stuff. Purim blood moon at 3:33 AM PST? Massive sell off. Sell some of your stocks and before that day especially institutional investor heavy stocks. Then wait for cheapies in things you were eyeing. Just bought a share of an oil stock that dumped. Makes no sense that it would dump when it was showing the start of a long slow upward trajectory before a classic bull run. And that was before the Iran thing. Oil stock are hardly dumping because they shouldn't be. Aware people are buying today while they dump good stocks for no apparent reason because of dumb rituals. I will wait much longer for other things. I know this could go on for years.

item.title: "Networking" is a waste of time — 47 replies — 8.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
"Networking" is a waste of time

Open thread • Replies: 47 • Updated: 2026-03-04 07:37 UTC

OP

> If you try to network with the rich, they'll laugh at you and go back to their ballgame "DON'T TALK ABOUT WORK PLEASE!"
> Try to network within your friends or family, "Yeah sure I know such and such and they'll let you know!" and you never hear anything back again
> Go to job fairs; "THANK YOU FOR YOUR RESUME! *shakes your hand* YOU CAN APPLY ONLINE AT WWW....NEXT!!!"

Where's the REAL advice on how to make money for once, outside of the memes "get a job" (which btw there are no real entry level jobs anymore) or "just gamble bro" (and end up in the 90%+ lost money statistic).

Sigh.

Early replies (first 3)

61930524
>>61930491
You join forces with other 4channers at a meetup in Miami.

61930527
>>61930491
true

61930539
>>61930491
anon, networking is a euphemism for "sucking cock". You want a job but have little to no experience? go to a bingo night for the elderly. Find the most homosexual old boomer faggot you can find and flirt with him. Be clear adn direct: I'll suck your cock for a job or penetrate you at your whim. Please. Then you land the job. You never noticed Bingo nights are full of 20 year old femboys flirting with old men. Of coarse not, you won't be asking retarded questions about networking here otterwise

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61931991
I've spent so much time building infrastructure in 100% independence to where my independent lifestyle compounds on itself. I'm too powerful and scare the Network Gen Xer with the audacity of my existence being a thing.

61932160
>>61931991
Take this mindset, and add that everyone else is expendable. You don't need to network.

61932381
>>61930491
It'll come to you, you have to figure it out on your own. Just watch the way shit works and it'll become clear.

If you don't have high IQ then you're ngmi

61932389
>>61931936
No one on 4chan is your friend. Anyone you "meet" here is a glownigger who wants to rape you and throw you in federal prison for the rest if your life so they can pin some shit on you that you simply cannot defend against.
This is not the place for making friends, it's the place for exchanging ideas and pondering things.

61932435
>>61930491
Are you ugly?

61932468
Networking is just making friends dumbass. You don’t try to network, your network emerges naturally

61932475
join the masons

61932476
>>61930491
"networking" is just non drug addicts exchanging phone numbers and complimenting each other's chubby wives

61932478
>>61932389
why would a glownigger bother trying to pin shit on a bunch of broke NEETs and send them to prison?

61932680
>>61932478
Because entry level glowniggers need to nail someones ass to prove their worth. Like how spartans had to kill a slave without getting caught, only legalistic.

61932690
>>61930491
networking is the business term for making friends. just be a human and talk to people, dont be needy and expect things from others.

61932775
>>61932680
Most retarded shit I have ever read

61932941
>>61932690
This. "Networking" is just me calling my buddies who are also in software and asking if their work is hiring when I am looking for a new job. They slip my resume in to the boss man past HR, and they get a nice bonus when I get hired. Which I will because I'm also actually good.

61932944
>>61930491
Rich people are just a bunch of retard that waste money in cocaine

61932961
>>61930630
>How to Speedrun The Downfall of Western Civilization

61932998
>>61932389
>This is not the place for making friends
Maybe not for a faggot like you

61933006
>>61932998
>>61932389
Some of my oldest and best friends are from 4chan. Granted, it is a different place these days.

61933012
>>61930491
>If you try to network with the rich, they'll laugh at you and go back to their ballgame "DON'T TALK ABOUT WORK PLEASE!"
You don't understand what networking is.

61933013
>>61933006
There are still a lot of younger people attracted to 4chan for some reason. If you enjoy having friends that might be a decade younger than you they're out there and willing to meet. Just don't bother with /soc/, bunch of homos and retards.

61933089
>>61932775
Whatever man, it's your ass if they're on that shit.

61933121
>>61930630
>Be an Indian who always has energy for endless bullshit but never the spirit to build/innovate
Response is fake but reflects reality. This is how boomers hire and why we're being replaced.

61933152
>>61933013
Nah I stick to the blue boards. /soc/ is fuckin gross.

61933171
>>61930630
>If you don't finish the event energised, at least a dozen business cards in your hand
but i'm always tired, depressed, and i hate to socialize :(

61933249
The networking advice they give to high school and college kids is hilarious. Nobody wants to "network" with some nameless fungible newbie. If you're starting from zero and don't have some kind of edge like a rich uncle or a gigachad face, then networking means befriending other entry level people and keeping up with them so they'll remember you after they move to a new company and get promoted. It takes years, even decades to pay off. If you're lucky you might also impress a manager who will let you ride his coattails as he moves up the corporate ladder, but don't count on that.

61933294
>>61932680
What the fuck is wrong with you

61933544
>>61933294
I am reasonably well seasoned, my (merited) fear of spooks keeps me from doing sketchy shit, like meeting complete and total strangers off of 20th century German literature forums.

Didn't you parents ever tell you not to meet up with strangers off the internet?

61933551
>>61933544
The first time I met people from 4chan it was to get drunk deep inna woods and shoot at dirt with a bunch of firearms. I'm still alive.

61933577
>>61933551
What, 20 years ago before feds and every other bad actor started lingering here looking for someone to exploit like a nigger hanging outside a gas station late at night?

I treat people here like I treat people at work. At arms length. I'll talk with you, but I absolutely do not want to hang out outside of here and I DEFINITELY don't want you knowing my personal business/details. That's how you get murdered and raped.

61933662
>>61933577
Yeah over 15 years ago anyway.

61933702
>>61930491

item.title: ""THE FUTURE OF FINANCE"" — 38 replies — 7.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
""THE FUTURE OF FINANCE""

Open thread • Replies: 38 • Updated: 2026-03-04 08:17 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

61921606
>>61921599

>exchanges
Deserved.

61921612
>>61921599
What is slippage and who would set it to 99%.... Probably above 100 iq bigbrain bros fr fr no cap!

61921797
>>61921599
why did you repost this shit from the last decade?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61923392
>>61922425
What is slippage?

61923405
>>61921599
Guess he should have set a higher gas fee lmao

61923519
>>61922206
>PoS
it's in the name

61923521
>>61921797
it’s last week you retard

61923564
>>61922425
yep, obviously not when they can’t control it.

61923565
Meanwhile.......

61923572
>>61922425
link solves this unironically

61923784
>>61921599
Why isn't SVR used everywhere?

61923804
>>61921599
>eth
There’s your problem.

61924939
>>61921599
Wtf does this even mean in plain English? I'm somewhat retarded, can someone explain

61924989
>>61921599
Wait a second that's not a transaction that's random AI slop

61925063
>>61924989
You're telling me you don't use "Uniowap V3"?

61925067
>>61924939
https://www.coinbase.com/learn/crypto-glossary/what-are-sandwich-attacks-in-crypto
only happens with PoS shitcoins like ETH

61925211
I'll try to explain it as simply as possible:

Everything in a blockchain is public and these swaps (like uniswap) use pools of tokens to facilitate trades...so a USDT/USDC swap has an equal amount of each token.

As people trade more USDT for USDC, the price of USDC goes up relative to USDT...so basically as the number of USDC goes to 0, the price of USDC (in terms of USDT) goes to infinity. The idea is you always want an even amount in each pool to keep prices stable.

People run blockchain validators with software called "flashbots" which is very quick software. These validators get to decide the order of transactions in a blockchain, and they generally order transactions based on who is willing to pay the most in txn fees.

So an analogy would be something like: you walk into a currency exchange and say "I'M GONNA SWAP $215K (i.e. USDC) for Swiss Francs (i.e. USDT)! Some guy hears you say this and cuts the line to get ahead of you (i.e. outbids your txn so he can do an exchange before you).

He basically then runs up to the counter and buys a bunch of Swiss Francs before your turn comes up.

Because he just bought a large amount, the exchange booth now has fewer Swiss Francs left and a lot more dollars. So the exchange rate changes...Swiss Francs just became more expensive.

Now it’s your turn.

You still go through with your $215K exchange, but the rate is no longer the fair 1:1 rate you expected. Since the booth’s supply of Swiss Francs is now low, the clerk gives you a terrible rate. You get way fewer francs than you should have.

Right after your trade finishes, the guy who cut in line steps back up to the counter.

Now the booth has tons of dollars (because of your big swap) and Swiss Francs are overpriced. So he sells the Swiss Francs he just bought back to the booth at this new, better rate.

He walks away with more dollars than he started with.

61925234
>>61924989
We are currently witnessing the beginning of the end, not long before the internet will become unusable

61925244
>>61921606
does that include the nasdaq?

61925264
https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=UnPIVmkfSbs
>is this guy talking about metalicus?

61925270
>>61925211
thanks chatgpt

61925297
>>61921599
I interviewed with a company that does this.
Gravity Team.
This is exactly what they do. They have bots operating on 60 exchanges jewing everyone.
Owned by a Russian jew.

61925316
>>61925270
Curious...why do you think that response was generated by AI? It is sad that any time you try to give an explanation on biz now, people just assume it is GPT. The rate at which people are offloading all thinking to AI is pretty demoralizing actually.

The original response to that post would have been:

>go back
>reddit spacing

or something similarly gay

61925340
>>61925297
This isn't really "jewing" people...it is a feature of how these networks work and there are plenty of ways to avoid being sandwich attacked like this. So if you get sandwich attacked this badly, it's just ignorance. There are also networks that have fair ordering natively.

61925343
>>61921606
>>exchanges
It's not an exchange

61925444
>>61921599

61933166

61933484

nigger just use the correct slippage wtf

trust no one

61933509
>>61921599

61933793
>>61922350
>Users accustomed to legacy banking systems rarely anticipate that their on-chain swap can be exploited before it settles.
Lol at these niggas explaining why their shoddy products lost your life savings while calling banks "legacy systems"
